notes: The -E suffix denotes the European variant using euroblock (detachable 3.5mm terminal block) connectors for audio and control ports instead of captive screw terminals. HDMI 2.0 grade is confirmed by product description (supports 4K60 4:2:0, HDCP 2.2). The DM Input 2 uses RJ-45 physically but carries DM Essentials (HDBaseT-based) signal — closest standard connector is rj45; grade set to eth-1g to reflect 1G-capable Cat cable link. COM port is RS-232 over euroblock (not a DB9). Power is supplied via included external 24VDC adapter (dc-barrel), not a direct AC inlet. Not rack-mountable (desktop/surface-mount unit).

ports.name: HDMI Input 1
ports.note: HDMI Type A female; supports HDMI 2.0, HDCP 2.2, DVI and Dual-Mode DisplayPort compatible

ports.name: DM Input 2
ports.note: 8-pin shielded RJ-45 (yellow); DM Essentials HDBaseT input; accepts DM Essentials transmitter signal; up to 230 ft at 2K, 130 ft at 4K

ports.name: HDMI Output
ports.note: HDMI Type A female; scaling output; DVI compatible

ports.name: Audio L/R
ports.note: 5-pin 3.5mm detachable euroblock terminal block; balanced/unbalanced stereo line-level audio output

ports.name: I/O 1
ports.note: 2-pin detachable terminal block; Versiport digital I/O or analog input

ports.name: I/O 2
ports.note: 2-pin detachable terminal block; Versiport digital I/O or analog input

ports.name: Relay 1
ports.note: 2-pin detachable terminal block; normally open isolated relay; rated 1A, 30VAC/VDC

ports.name: Relay 2
ports.note: 2-pin detachable terminal block; normally open isolated relay; rated 1A, 30VAC/VDC

ports.name: IR
ports.note: 2-pin 3.5mm detachable terminal block; IR output control port

ports.name: COM
ports.note: 5-pin 3.5mm detachable terminal block; bidirectional RS-232 control port

ports.name: Service
ports.note: USB Type A female; for factory/service use only

ports.name: 24V DC
ports.note: 2.1x5.5mm DC barrel; 24VDC 1.25A; includes PW-2412WU power pack (external adapter)
